[Media] https://www.reddit.com/r/UnityAppClub/comments/1ss5x9e/unity_app_how_caller_id_cli_testing_works/

author: Cipri
msg: Anyone knows how to add a license on a phone that was added in the same phone before? I had to factory reset it, then installed Unity again and tried to add the same licese that was working on it before but it wont let me

author: Cloud #TONCLAW
msg: click the 3 dots on the bottom right then click on work scroll down and find the license ID then click bind
